value.found_quote:
## The cloud environment

Each session runs in a fresh Anthropic-managed VM with your repository cloned. This section covers what's available when a session starts and how to customize it.
value.rationale: The page describes "The cloud environment" as a documented section of Claude Code on the web, which runs on Anthropic-managed cloud infrastructure. The feature is in research preview for Pro, Max, Team, and certain Enterprise users.
